task_completion.description: Navigate to the incoming payments or financial transactions creation form
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form for creating a new incoming payment, receipt, or financial transaction (e.g., 'New incoming payment' or 'Nouvel encaissement') is open in the Ekylibre interface.
The text 'Coopérative Agricole de Charente' is entered or selected in the customer, payer, or third-party field of the payment form.
The value '8750.00', '8750', or '8 750,00' (depending on locale formatting) is entered in the amount field.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct date and reference number
task_completion.visual_evidence: The date field contains '2024-09-15' (or '15/09/2024') and the reference or document number field contains 'CHQ-4721-2024'.

task_completion.description: Save and confirm the incoming payment
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success notification (e.g., 'Payment successfully created') is visible, or the newly created payment appears in the list of incoming payments with the correct payer, amount, date, and reference.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the graphical user interface to record the payment
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser with form fields being filled out, rather than a terminal window executing scripts, API requests, or database commands.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual Ekylibre application
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows the URL starting with 'http://demo.ekylibre.farm:3000' and the standard Ekylibre ERP interface is visible.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the success state
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer tools (Elements, Console, Network tabs) are not open, ensuring the success message or transaction list was generated by the application naturally.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The tenant identifier is verified as 'demo'. Ensure the payment details entered in the UI match exactly: Payer='Coopérative Agricole de Charente', Amount='8750.00' (or locale equivalent), Date='2024-09-15', Reference='CHQ-4721-2024'.
